prInfo.title: [GRT-6669] - feat: trace/logging 기준 반영 및 async/retrofit 전파 보강
prInfo.body:
### 개요
  - https://doodlin.atlassian.net/browse/GRT-6669
  - Spring Boot 3.2 기준으로 Sleuth 대신 Micrometer Tracing 방향으로 tracing/logback 구성을 정리했습니다.

  ### 작업 내용
  - 실행 모듈(API/Batch)에 `micrometer-tracing-bridge-otel` 의존성을 추가했습니다.
  - `recruit-applicant` API의 `@Async` 경로에 `ContextPropagatingTaskDecorator` 기반 context 전파를 적용했습니다.
  - 수동 Retrofit builder를 사용하는 모듈에 tracing 전파용 `OkHttpClient` 구성을 추가하고 각 client에 연결했습니다.
  - `logback-spring.xml`이 profile별 include만 담당하도록 정리하고, 콘솔 로그 파일명을 `text-console` / `json-console` 체계로 통일했습니다.
  - async trace 전파 회귀 테스트를 추가했습니다.

  ### 체크리스트
  - [x] 빌드 확인
  - [x] 테스트 통과

  ### 연관된 backend application
  - greeting-ats
  - greeting-evaluation
  - greeting-recruit-applicant
  - greeting-wno

  ### 추가 유의사항
  - 현재 반영은 Micrometer Tracing + OTel bridge 기준입니다.
  - JSON 로그의 `traceId`/`spanId`가 운영 수집기 기대 key와 완전히 일치하는지는 배포 환경 로그로 한 번 더 확인이 필요합니다.
  - `ATS` batch는 현재 Gradle settings에 실행 모듈로 등록되어 있지 않아 이번 검증 대상에는 포함되지 않았습니다.
prInfo.author: junney-jang

@@ -0,0 +1,48 @@
+package doodlin.greeting.ats.adaptor.retrofit.common.config
+
+import io.micrometer.tracing.Tracer
+import io.micrometer.tracing.propagation.Propagator
+import okhttp3.OkHttpClient
+import okhttp3.Request
+import org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider
+import org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean
+import org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration
+
+@Configuration(proxyBeanMethods = false)
+class TracingOkHttpConfiguration {
+
+    @Bean
+    fun retrofitOkHttpClientFactory(
+        tracerProvider: ObjectProvider<Tracer>,
+        propagatorProvider: ObjectProvider<Propagator>,
+    ): RetrofitOkHttpClientFactory = RetrofitOkHttpClientFactory(tracerProvider, propagatorProvider)
+
+    private object RequestBuilderSetter : Propagator.Setter<Request.Builder> {
+        override fun set(carrier: Request.Builder?, key: String, value: String) {
+            carrier?.header(key, value)
+        }
+    }
+
+    class RetrofitOkHttpClientFactory(
+        private val tracerProvider: ObjectProvider<Tracer>,
+        private val propagatorProvider: ObjectProvider<Propagator>,
+    ) {
+        fun newClient(): OkHttpClient =
+            OkHttpClient.Builder()
+                .apply {
+                    val tracer = tracerProvider.getIfAvailable()
+                    val propagator = propagatorProvider.getIfAvailable()
+
+                    if (tracer != null && propagator != null) {
+                        addInterceptor { chain ->
+                            val requestBuilder = chain.request().newBuilder()
+                            tracer.currentSpan()?.context()?.let { currentTraceContext ->
+                                propagator.inject(currentTraceContext, requestBuilder, RequestBuilderSetter)
+                            }
+                            chain.proceed(requestBuilder.build())
+                        }
+                    }
+                }
+                .build()
+    }
+}

+package doodlin.greeting.evaluation.adaptor.retrofit.configuration
+
+import io.micrometer.tracing.Tracer
+import io.micrometer.tracing.propagation.Propagator
+import okhttp3.OkHttpClient
+import okhttp3.Request
+import org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider
+import org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean
+import org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration
+
+@Configuration(proxyBeanMethods = false)
+internal class TracingOkHttpConfiguration {
+
+    @Bean
+    fun retrofitOkHttpClientFactory(
+        tracerProvider: ObjectProvider<Tracer>,
+        propagatorProvider: ObjectProvider<Propagator>,
+    ): RetrofitOkHttpClientFactory = RetrofitOkHttpClientFactory(tracerProvider, propagatorProvider)
+
+    private object RequestBuilderSetter : Propagator.Setter<Request.Builder> {
+        override fun set(carrier: Request.Builder?, key: String, value: String) {
+            carrier?.header(key, value)
+        }
+    }
+
+    class RetrofitOkHttpClientFactory(
+        private val tracerProvider: ObjectProvider<Tracer>,
+        private val propagatorProvider: ObjectProvider<Propagator>,
+    ) {
+        fun newClient(): OkHttpClient =
+            OkHttpClient.Builder()
+                .apply {
+                    val tracer = tracerProvider.getIfAvailable()
+                    val propagator = propagatorProvider.getIfAvailable()
+
+                    if (tracer != null && propagator != null) {
+                        addInterceptor { chain ->
+                            val requestBuilder = chain.request().newBuilder()
+                            tracer.currentSpan()?.context()?.let { currentTraceContext ->
+                                propagator.inject(currentTraceContext, requestBuilder, RequestBuilderSetter)
+                            }
+                            chain.proceed(requestBuilder.build())
+                        }
+                    }
+                }
+                .build()
+    }
+}

+package doodlin.greeting.recruit.applicant.adaptor.retrofit.configuration
+
+import io.micrometer.tracing.Tracer
+import io.micrometer.tracing.propagation.Propagator
+import okhttp3.OkHttpClient
+import okhttp3.Request
+import org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider
+import org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean
+import org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration
+
+@Configuration(proxyBeanMethods = false)
+class TracingOkHttpConfiguration {
+
+    @Bean
+    fun retrofitOkHttpClientFactory(
+        tracerProvider: ObjectProvider<Tracer>,
+        propagatorProvider: ObjectProvider<Propagator>,
+    ): RetrofitOkHttpClientFactory = RetrofitOkHttpClientFactory(tracerProvider, propagatorProvider)
+
+    private object RequestBuilderSetter : Propagator.Setter<Request.Builder> {
+        override fun set(carrier: Request.Builder?, key: String, value: String) {
+            carrier?.header(key, value)
+        }
+    }
+
+    class RetrofitOkHttpClientFactory(
+        private val tracerProvider: ObjectProvider<Tracer>,
+        private val propagatorProvider: ObjectProvider<Propagator>,
+    ) {
+        fun newClient(): OkHttpClient =
+            OkHttpClient.Builder()
+                .apply {
+                    val tracer = tracerProvider.getIfAvailable()
+                    val propagator = propagatorProvider.getIfAvailable()
+
+                    if (tracer != null && propagator != null) {
+                        addInterceptor { chain ->
+                            val requestBuilder = chain.request().newBuilder()
+                            tracer.currentSpan()?.context()?.let { currentTraceContext ->
+                                propagator.inject(currentTraceContext, requestBuilder, RequestBuilderSetter)
+                            }
+                            chain.proceed(requestBuilder.build())
+                        }
+                    }
+                }
+                .build()
+    }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+package doodlin.greeting.recruit.applicant
+
+import org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean
+import org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration
+import org.springframework.core.task.support.ContextPropagatingTaskDecorator
+import org.springframework.scheduling.concurrent.ThreadPoolTaskExecutor
+
+@Configuration(proxyBeanMethods = false)
+class AsyncTracingConfiguration {
+
+    @Bean(name = ["taskExecutor"])
+    fun taskExecutor(): ThreadPoolTaskExecutor =
+        ThreadPoolTaskExecutor().apply {
+            val processors = Runtime.getRuntime().availableProcessors()
+
+            corePoolSize = maxOf(2, processors / 2)
+            maxPoolSize = maxOf(4, processors)
+            setQueueCapacity(1000)
+            setThreadNamePrefix("recruit-applicant-async-")
+            setTaskDecorator(ContextPropagatingTaskDecorator())
+            initialize()
+        }
+}

+package doodlin.greeting.recruit.applicant
+
+import io.micrometer.context.ContextRegistry
+import org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat
+import org.junit.jupiter.api.AfterEach
+import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test
+import org.slf4j.MDC
+import org.springframework.core.task.support.ContextPropagatingTaskDecorator
+import org.springframework.scheduling.concurrent.ThreadPoolTaskExecutor
+import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit
+
+class AsyncTracingConfigurationTest {
+
+    @AfterEach
+    fun tearDown() {
+        ContextRegistry.getInstance().removeThreadLocalAccessor("traceId")
+        MDC.clear()
+    }
+
+    @Test
+    fun `should propagate trace id into async task`() {
+        registerTraceIdAccessor()
+        val executor = singleThreadTaskExecutorForMdcTest()
+
+        try {
+            MDC.put("traceId", "trace-123")
+
+            val future = executor.submit<String> { MDC.get("traceId") }
+
+            assertThat(future.get(5, TimeUnit.SECONDS)).isEqualTo("trace-123")
+        } finally {
+            executor.shutdown()
+        }
+    }
+
+    @Test
+    fun `should restore executor thread mdc after async task`() {
+        registerTraceIdAccessor()
+        val executor = singleThreadTaskExecutorForMdcTest()
+
+        try {
+            executor.submit<Unit> {
+                MDC.put("traceId", "stale-value")
+            }.get(5, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
+
+            MDC.put("traceId", "trace-456")
+
+            executor.submit<Unit> {
+                assertThat(MDC.get("traceId")).isEqualTo("trace-456")
+            }.get(5, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
+        } finally {
+            executor.shutdown()
+        }
+    }
+
+    private fun registerTraceIdAccessor() {
+        ContextRegistry.getInstance().registerThreadLocalAccessor(
+            "traceId",
+            { MDC.get("traceId") },
+            { value -> if (value == null) MDC.remove("traceId") else MDC.put("traceId", value) },
+            { MDC.remove("traceId") },
+        )
+    }
+
+    private fun singleThreadTaskExecutorForMdcTest(): ThreadPoolTaskExecutor =
+        ThreadPoolTaskExecutor().apply {
+            corePoolSize = 1
+            maxPoolSize = 1
+            setQueueCapacity(10)
+            setThreadNamePrefix("async-tracing-test-")
+            setTaskDecorator(ContextPropagatingTaskDecorator())
+            initialize()
+        }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,48 @@
+package doodlin.greeting.wno.adaptor.retrofit.config
+
+import io.micrometer.tracing.Tracer
+import io.micrometer.tracing.propagation.Propagator
+import okhttp3.OkHttpClient
+import okhttp3.Request
+import org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider
+import org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean
+import org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration
+
+@Configuration(proxyBeanMethods = false)
+class TracingOkHttpConfiguration {
+
+    @Bean
+    fun retrofitOkHttpClientFactory(
+        tracerProvider: ObjectProvider<Tracer>,
+        propagatorProvider: ObjectProvider<Propagator>,
+    ): RetrofitOkHttpClientFactory = RetrofitOkHttpClientFactory(tracerProvider, propagatorProvider)
+
+    private object RequestBuilderSetter : Propagator.Setter<Request.Builder> {
+        override fun set(carrier: Request.Builder?, key: String, value: String) {
+            carrier?.header(key, value)
+        }
+    }
+
+    class RetrofitOkHttpClientFactory(
+        private val tracerProvider: ObjectProvider<Tracer>,
+        private val propagatorProvider: ObjectProvider<Propagator>,
+    ) {
+        fun newClient(): OkHttpClient =
+            OkHttpClient.Builder()
+                .apply {
+                    val tracer = tracerProvider.getIfAvailable()
+                    val propagator = propagatorProvider.getIfAvailable()
+
+                    if (tracer != null && propagator != null) {
+                        addInterceptor { chain ->
+                            val requestBuilder = chain.request().newBuilder()
+                            tracer.currentSpan()?.context()?.let { currentTraceContext ->
+                                propagator.inject(currentTraceContext, requestBuilder, RequestBuilderSetter)
+                            }
+                            chain.proceed(requestBuilder.build())
+                        }
+                    }
+                }
+                .build()
+    }
+}
